achievements.title: Crate-aceous Period
achievements.description: Recruit Agumon to File City by defeating it in mutual combat in the Native Forest

achievements.title: Not Quite Plant-Based
achievements.description: Recruit Palmon to File City by provoking it into a fight in the Native Forest

achievements.title: Worming Your Way Through
achievements.description: Recruit Kunemon to File City by feeding it and winning a battle in the Native Forest

achievements.title: Hook, Line, and Sinker!
achievements.description: Recruit Coelamon to File City by returning to Coela Point after the Digimon Bridge is fixed

achievements.title: A Clinical Approach
achievements.description: Recruit Centarumon to File City by withstanding its assault in the Amida Forest

achievements.title: I'll Be There in Spirit
achievements.description: Recruit Bakemon to File City by correctly answering its vague questions in the Overdell Cemetery

achievements.title: Beta Safe than Sorry
achievements.description: Recruit Betamon to File City by agreeing to its request in the Mangrove Region

achievements.description: Recruit Monochromon to File City by earning a tidy profit in the Monochrome Shop

achievements.title: Abandoning the Nest
achievements.description: Recruit Birdramon to File City by proving your worth in the Great Canyon
achievements.author: mario2188

achievements.title: That's One Shell of a Story!
achievements.description: Recruit Shellmon to File City by helping it down from the pillar in the Great Canyon Bridge

achievements.title: Ok, Now We're Cooking!
achievements.description: Recruit Meramon to File City by quelling its rage in the Lava Cave
achievements.author: mario2188

achievements.title: Are You Paying for This?
achievements.description: Recruit Elecmon to File City by enduring three of its electric shocks in the Gear Savannah
achievements.author: mario2188

achievements.title: Third Time's a Charm
achievements.description: Recruit Patamon to File City by securing a trio of victories in the Gear Savannah
achievements.author: mario2188

achievements.title: Final Destination
achievements.description: Recruit Leomon to File City by retrieving its ancestral tablet and returning to the Gear Savannah

achievements.title: Who Missed the Toilet!?
achievements.description: Recruit Sukamon to File City by locating its home in Trash Mountain
achievements.author: mario2188

achievements.title: A Nose for Treasure
achievements.description: Recruit Gabumon to File City by finding and defeating it in the Misty Trees
achievements.author: mario2188

achievements.title: Perched for Purchase
achievements.description: Recruit Biyomon to File City by setting a well-planned trap in the Gear Savannah
achievements.author: mario2188

achievements.title: Tiny Arms, Huge Portions!
achievements.description: Recruit Tyrannomon to File City by relieving it of its guard duty in the Ancient Dino Region

achievements.title: Just Hanging Around
achievements.description: Recruit Monzaemon to File City by restoring peace to Toy Town

achievements.title: From Freezer to Frying Pan
achievements.description: Recruit Frigimon to File City by proving your resilience to the cold in Freezeland

achievements.title: Why Halo There!
achievements.description: Recruit Angemon to File City by freeing it from its statue form in the Ice Sanctuary

achievements.title: Always Taken for Granite
achievements.description: Recruit Penguinmon to File City by displaying your curling skills in Freezeland

achievements.title: Mojya Money, Mojya Problems
achievements.description: Recruit Mojyamon to File City by trading all its requested items in Freezeland

achievements.title: History, Shrouded in Fog
achievements.description: Befriend Cherrymon after learning the history of File Island and clearing the fog in the Misty Trees

achievements.title: Whale You Be Mine?
achievements.description: Recruit Whamon to File City by driving Ogremon out of its cave in Freezeland

achievements.description: Recruit Garurumon to File City by defeating it in a fair fight in Freezeland

achievements.title: Monumental Success
achievements.description: Recruit Kokatorimon to File City by winning an early-morning brawl in the Misty Trees

achievements.title: A Sign of Things to Come

achievements.title: Better Luck Next Time!

achievements.title: Can You Dig It, Sucka?
achievements.description: Recruit Drimogemon to File City after it finishes digging in the Drill Tunnel

achievements.title: You Can't Make an Omelette...

achievements.title: I'll Sea You Later

achievements.title: Man, You Really Do Stink!

achievements.title: The Enemy of My Enemy...
